name: Pablo G. del Amo
biography:
Pablo González del Amo (Madrid, 1927 - ibid., August 4, 2004) was a Spanish film editor.

Responsible for films by prominent Spanish film directors such as Carlos Saura, Elías Querejeta, Víctor Erice, Pilar Miró, José Luis García Sánchez, Manuel Gutiérrez Aragón, José Luis Borau or Fernando Fernán Gómez, among others, he was winner of three Goya awards, National Cinematography Award and founding member of the Spanish Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences.
